description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round face and a retro design, featuring a metallic blue body and two prominent blue bells on top. The clock face is white with black Arabic numerals at the 12, 3, 6, and 9 positions, and black hour and minute hands. A small metallic hammer is positioned between the bells, designed to strike them when the alarm sounds. The clock is supported by two short metallic legs and has a curved brass handle arching over the top. The back of the clock is solid and metallic, with no visible controls or battery compartment in these views. The overall appearance is robust and functional, with a glossy finish on the metal surfaces.
description: A vintage-style blue twin-bell alarm clock with a round face, black hands, and metallic accents. The design is robust, with a glossy finish and prominent bells on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black numerals, black hands, and the two blue bells with a brass handle above.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the brass handle, the blue bell, and the central hammer between the bells.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid metallic back and the blue bells, with no visible controls or markings.
description_view_3: Another top-down view similar to view 1, emphasizing the symmetry of the bells and handle.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black Arabic numerals at the 12, 3, 6, and 9 positions, and simple black hands.
